name: Chest Warriors
author: Poki
description: Chest Warriors is an action-packed adventure where every smash brings you closer to glory! Break open coins, unlock treasure chests filled with legendary weapons, and hatch eggs to collect powerful pets. Battle fierce bosses, unlock vibrant new areas, and upgrade your hero and companions to become unstoppable. Ready to chase epic treasures and crush everything in your path? Join the adventure and become a true Chest Warrior! How to play Chest Warriors? Move: WASD or the arrow keys Camera: move your cursor Attack: left click Who created Chest Warriors? Chest Warriors is created by Zupga. Play their other games on Poki: Cat Room Blast and Build Land ! How can I play Chest Warriors for free? You can play Chest Warriors for free on Poki. Can I play Chest Warriors on mobile devices and desktop? Chest Warriors can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets. Can I play Chest Warriors with my friend? Yes! Chest Warriors is a multiplayer game so you can play with your friends online!
